name: finny
description: Finny — Finance Invoice Notification & Navigation for You (AP invoice automation)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/server && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
